name: Creamy Picante Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and pace picante sauce.
2. Stir in the sour cream until well mixed.
3. Add the ground cumin if using, and stir again to incorporate.
4. Transfer the dressing to an airtight container.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
6. Use this creamy picante dressing on mixed green salads, coleslaw, potato salads, or pasta salads.
7. Drizzle over sliced tomatoes.
Makes approximately 1-1/2 cups.
